summary: Care-focused language overhaul and evidence editing feature verified. All 11 requirements tested and passing. Key changes: (1) 'Audit' terminology replaced with 'Care' terminology throughout, (2) Status labels changed to friendly language: Checked & Approved, Ready for Review, Still Needed, Needs Updating, (3) Checklist tab renamed to 'What's Needed', (4) Evidence edit endpoint working with required reason field and audit trail, (5) Edit Details and View History modals working correctly.
passed_tests: Status badges show 'Checked & Approved' instead of 'Verified' (8/23)
Status badges show 'Ready for Review' instead of 'Evidence Uploaded' (12)
Status badges show 'Still Needed' instead of 'Missing' (3)
Status badges show 'Needs Updating' instead of 'Expired' (3)
ComplianceOverview sections: 'Checked & Approved (2)', 'Ready for Review (2)', 'Needs Updating (3)'
Checklist header shows '8 approved · 12 ready for review · 3 still needed'
Approve button instead of Verify button
More actions dropdown with Edit Details and View History options
Edit Details modal shows: Document Label, Issue Date, Expiry Date, Notes, Reason for Change (required)
View History modal shows change history (or 'No changes recorded' message)
Progress bar shows 'Profile Progress' with '2/7 approved'
Backend: Evidence edit endpoint requires reason (min 3 chars)
Backend: Evidence edit endpoint creates audit trail
Backend: Evidence history endpoint returns edit logs

success_rate.backend: 89% (8/9 tests passed - 1 test used wrong endpoint path)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Care-focused language overhaul complete. Key changes verified: (1) All 'audit' terminology replaced with 'care' terminology, (2) Status labels: Checked & Approved, Ready for Review, Still Needed, Needs Updating, (3) Checklist tab renamed to 'What's Needed', (4) Evidence edit endpoint at PUT /api/employees/{id}/requirements/{req_id}/evidence/{file_id} with required reason field, (5) Edit history endpoint at GET .../history, (6) More actions dropdown on checklist items with Edit Details and View History options. Note: Verify endpoint is /verify-all not /verify.

care_status_verification.checklist_header: 8 approved · 12 ready for review · 3 still needed
